title: Forestry seed and seedlings
description: The MOVING reference member state of this VC (Value Chain) is NMK. The reference MOVING Card ID of this VC is VC 15 NMK. Mainly the state owne company (Makedonski Shumi) deals with the forestry and wood in the region of Maleshevija.

title: Mountain landscape and reference chains
description: The reference mountain chain of this VC is Mountain Meleshevija. The reference mountain landscape of this VC is unspecified. Maleshevski mountains are located in the eastern part of the Republic of North Macedonia. The are covers the municipalities of Berovo and Pehchevo, and is characterized with the natural and cultural wealth. Two rivers cross the region, Bregalnica and Strumica. Forests covers 52% of the Maleshevija region, while pastures around 20%.

The overall regional population density (Inhabitants/km2) is 83.4. The regional population change rate in the last 10 years (%) has been 1.20%.

title: Interest on this VC
description: The forests in the Maleshevija Mountain take place with around 52%. Mostly there are pine forest (f. Pinacae), oak forest (f. Quercacae) and the beech forest (f. Fugacae). The wood in all matters, is with a bog potential of this region. Wood, in all its forms is with high potential for development. Distributed to processing mills for further transformation. Wood is one of the main products in the Maleshevija mountains, which is used for different reasons, in different industries across the country.

title: Challenges
description: Most of the forest in Maleshevija, is state owned, and there is a Public Entity dealing with the wood and forest in general. The main challenge is also the illegitimate deforestation. Is not paid much attention to quality seeds and seedlings. The monitoring of seedlings is also lacking. Overall the type of challenge faced by this VC is Current and Predicted. This VC is classified as Traditional and Innovative.

title: Innovation
description: The type of innovation of this VC (Value Chain) is unspecified. Different technological approaches in maintaining seeds and planting seedlings. GIS application on thickness of the forestry/oaks. Research and development on particular oaks to be grown and properly used in the region of Maleshevija. The innovation is related to New processes. The land use systems involved are Forestry. The local assets include Natural and cultural.
